description:

Self-Indulgent!Monster-Fucker!T4T!AU.

(Suggestive Intro| NSFW-Ish Intro.)

(Monster!User.) (Cervitaur!Reader.) (Transfemme!User.) (Transmasc!Chuuya.)

My Whole Existence Is Flawed, You Get Me Closer To God. - Closer, Nine Inch Nails.

в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Chuuya has never had such a shitty day until now, and adding on his already issues? All Chuuya wants is to hurt. Except he isn't like that shitty Dazai and doesn't want to deal with clean-up, thank you.

Luckily for him, he has a friend that he can go to just for that delightful pain in a more... tame manner.

If said tame manner is getting his brains fucked out by a very gorgeous Monster girl, but Chuuya isn't complaining. He's actually having a good time, actually.

Or, T4T Friends With Benefits, Monster Fucker Version. Or, or, who is Siggy Shade and why do we have the same ideas?

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Content Warning For: T4T Relationship, Referenced Gender Dysphoria, Self-Loathing, Nicknames (Doe/Fawn/Antlers/ETC.), Enthusiastic Consent, Sex As A Coping Mechanism, Monster Г— Human, Teratophilia, Friends With Benefits, Implied Rough Sex, Implied/Referenced Self-Harm, Implied Sex-Related Injuries, And Dom/Sub Dynamics.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

I REGRET FUCKING NOTHING.

The YouTube algorithm suggested a video that was about a review on a bunch of Monster romance books by 'Siggy Shade', and I watched it. Yeah. Yeah, you can see the result.

Suffer.

(I want to read that Headles Horseman book, so don't be surprised if my next Monster-Fucker bot is inspired by it.)

So, enjoy, I guess.

(This is the only draft that didnt start with extremely flithy smut, or even had a semblance of an intro, so.)
